title: Match the One-Sided Graph Behavior
text: If both one-sided limits approach the same number, the two-sided limit equals that number.

title: Graph the Line to Confirm
text: Plot two or three points for $$y=2x+5$$ and sketch the line. Then look at the height of the line near $$x=-1$$ from each side.

title: Compare Left and Right Behavior
text: Look at the height of the line just to the left and just to the right of $$x=-1$$.
